description_long: This is a modern kick scooter with a sturdy, metallic frame finished in a yellow color. It features a Y-shaped handlebar with a triangular grip area, providing stability and control for the rider. The deck is long, narrow, and covered with a dark, textured grip surface for secure footing. The scooter is equipped with two solid wheels, one at the front and one at the rear, both with white tires and black hubs. The front fork and rear wheel mount are reinforced, suggesting durability for urban commuting. No visible headlight or branding is present on the frame.
description: A yellow kick scooter with a Y-shaped handlebar, long grippy deck, and two solid wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Y-shaped handlebar, single front wheel, and narrow profile.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the deck, both wheels, and the upright handlebar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear wheel, deck width, and handlebar alignment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, both wheels, and the handlebar from the other side.
attribute_deck_design: long, narrow, rectangular deck with dark grip tape surface
